retry_reason: Put operation is unconditional and should only be called once per reference; retrying would cause use-after-free.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper for `ifacaddr6` objects. It decrements the `aca_refcnt` reference count and, if it reaches zero, schedules a deferred RCU callback to free the object (`aca_free_rcu`). The function is unconditional and void; the caller must not access the object after calling this function, as it may be freed asynchronously. This is the standard release operation – each prior get/refcount_inc should be paired with exactly one call to `aca_put`.
